title: Grace For A Child
content:
Here, a little child, I stand,
    Heaving up my either hand:
    Cold as paddocks though they be,
    Here I lift them up to thee,
    For a benison to fall
    On our meat, and on us all.
    Amen.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Grace For A Child"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
